title: Robin
description: A Robin that comes to my bird feeder every single day. Interestingly it also keeps showing up whenever the feeder is empty. He is not super shy, but also does not eat out of my hand.

title: Maple the Fox
description: This is Maple, a fox who visits my garden once every two or three days. She is quite confident around people, and not that shy. She did get mange this year, so I am trying to feed her a bit extra and feed her medication.

title: Maple Resting
description: Maple making herself at home in the backyard. She knows where the get the best food (the neighbours' meatballs), so she sometimes rests in front of their window.

title: Maple Waiting for Meatballs
description: Maple relaxing in the garden, patiently hoping the neighbours will come out with meatballs...

title: Maple Staring
description: Maple staring at me. I often give her some peanuts or some dried fruit as I figured that is part of a healthy diet.

title: Redwing
description: A Redwing caught mid-meal on a berry. I started spotting them in the garden in spring, and it's fun to see them eat the berries in the bushes.

title: Chiffchaff
description: A Chiffchaff spotted at the Walthamstow Wetlands. You often hear their repetitive "chiff-chaff" call before you spot them.

title: Long-tailed Tit
description: A Long-tailed Tit at the Walthamstow Wetlands. You often see them in large groups, and I even had a few of them in my garden this winter. They are not very keen on my bird feeder though.

title: Swan at Walthamstow Wetlands
description: A swan gliding through the Walthamstow Wetlands. It's quite a nice place to visit in London!

title: Seagull at Walthamstow Wetlands
description: A seagull at the Walthamstow Wetlands.

title: Willow the Fox
description: This is Willow, a fox who visits the garden occasionally. She is currently pregnant, which is wonderful — but she is also suffering from mange. If she keeps coming back (which she currently does every 4 days or so) it will be possible to feed her medication against her mange.

title: Willow's Breakfast
description: Willow tucking into an egg I left out for her. The plan is to get her visiting regularly and comfortable enough to eat here, so I can start hiding mange medication in her food.

title: Willow
description: Another visit from Willow. Hope she keeps coming back so I can see her cubs and make sure she gets healthy again!

title: Penguins on Robben Island
description: Some penguins I spotted on Robben Island in South Africa. This island is where Nelson Mandela was kept enprisoned from 1962 till 1982, but it also has a few small colonies on penguins!

title: Birds at Robben Island Harbour
description: There were tons of birds in the harbour of Robben Island. Despite the rough looking conditions they seem to fare well
